holds.detail: PM RULING R6 (Fable, 2026-07-02): gate-lane3's T4 stealth_dso proposal (ARCHER_OWNERSHIP_RESOLUTION_20260702.json) REJECTED fail-closed. A non-dentist NPPES AO titled 'Administrator' (Hamza Mohammed) + dentist PCs co-registered at 654 E 47th is STRUCTURE, not CONTROL — AO reach alone never meets the T4/T5 documentary bar. Two independent PM adversarial searches found NO documentary evidence Mohammed owns/controls Chicago Dentistry LLC; contra-signals (Practo lists Dr. Zishan Bader DDS at Archer Dentistry 47th St; SHAFEEQ H. BADER DDS SC at 5430 S Kedzie ties to 'Archer Dentistry Kedzie'; Bader-family PCs co-registered) make dentist-owned T3 at least equally plausible. T3 is NOT awarded either: dentist OWNERSHIP is equally undocumented (archerdentistry.com proves the 5-location network, not the owner). Resolution path, any ONE suffices: (1) IL SOS LLC file detail for CHICAGO DENTISTRY LLC / ARCHER DENTISTRY LLC naming members/managers (web portal 403s — manual pull); (2) IDFPR dental office license holder; (3) documentary ownership statement (owner-naming about/team page, news, or the owner's own professional profile).
